title: SLO Gating Rules
description: Governed configuration of stage-aware gating posture for the Decision Gating Engine (BN.3). Defines which pipeline stages permit warnings to continue and which are decision-bearing (warnings halt by default).

rules_version.description: Version of the gating rules file.

contract_version.description: Schema/contract version this file conforms to.

stages.description: Map of stage name to its gating posture.

stage_posture.description: Gating posture for a single pipeline stage.

warnings_allowed.description: When true, enforce_with_warning decisions may yield proceed_with_warning at this stage. When false, they yield halt.

decision_bearing.description: When true, this stage produces outputs that feed decision artifacts and must fail closed on warnings.
